Write every article in natural American English with a human editorial voice. Target 1200-1800 words. Avoid generic filler, repetitive phrasing, and robotic transitions.

## Introduction

Open with a vivid, specific scene or homeowner problem. Keep it conversational, expert, and practical.

Add 2-4 short paragraphs before the first image. Use sensory details, homeowner intent, and practical context.

<ArticleImage
  src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1000&h=1500&q=82"
  alt="Luxury American home with refined landscaping"
  overlay="25 Stunning Front Yard Ideas"
  position="bottom"
/>

## First Main Section

Use short paragraphs. Add images every 2-4 paragraphs, especially between H2 and H3 sections.

Write 2-4 paragraphs here, then insert another visual break.

<ArticleImage
  src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600566753190-17f0baa2a6c3?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1000&h=1500&q=82"
  alt="Modern American home with clean front yard landscaping"
  overlay="Modern Front Yard Inspiration"
  position="top"
/>

### Supporting Detail

Use lists when they help the reader scan:

- One practical idea
- One visual reason it works
- One realistic implementation note

<InternalLinkCard
  href="/ideas/modern-front-yard-landscaping/"
  title="Explore Modern Front Yard Landscaping"
  description="A category hub for clean curb appeal, architectural planting, and premium entry design."
/>

Add 2-4 more paragraphs after the internal link, then break the text with a relevant image.

<ArticleImage
  src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558904541-efa843a96f01?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1000&h=1500&q=82"
  alt="Front yard flower bed with natural light and realistic planting"
  overlay="Beautiful Flower Bed Designs"
  position="center"
/>

## Second Main Section

Add descriptive, specific guidance. Use examples from American homes, climate considerations, maintenance, and curb appeal.

<ArticleImage
  src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1564013799919-ab600027ffc6?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1000&h=1500&q=82"
  alt="Front walkway landscaping around an American home"
  overlay="Luxury Curb Appeal"
  position="center"
/>

### Image Placement Rule

For every article:

- Add an `ArticleImage` after every 2-4 paragraphs.
- Add an image between major H2 sections.
- Add an image after important H3 sections when the text becomes dense.
- Use specific alt text that describes the home, yard feature, and landscaping style.
- Use overlay text only on selected images so the layout feels editorial, not noisy.

## FAQ

<FaqSection items={[
  {
    question: 'How often should I update front yard landscaping?',
    answer: 'Most front yards benefit from a seasonal refresh, but the core structure should last for years when the layout is simple and well planned.'
  }
]} />

## Conclusion

End with a confident, human summary and a next-step internal link.
